clinical_note: 45-year-old female with acute pleuritic chest pain, hemoptysis, and DVT risk factors on long-haul flight

pattern_1_basic_streaming.output_preview:
## Chief Complaint & HPI Summary
45-year-old female presenting with acute left-sided pleuritic chest pain and dyspnea of 6 hours duration, onset during a long-haul flight...

pattern_3_event_streaming.note: Shows intermediate pipeline steps as they execute — useful for debugging and audit logging

structured_analysis_output.chief_complaint: Acute left-sided pleuritic chest pain with hemoptysis
key_findings: Right calf swelling and tenderness (suggests DVT)
ECG: S1Q3T3 pattern and right axis deviation
structured_analysis_output.assessment: Clinical presentation highly consistent with acute pulmonary embolism with concurrent DVT
structured_analysis_output.disposition: Admit to monitored bed. Initiate therapeutic anticoagulation (heparin drip) pending CTPA.
